title: Front Office Manager - Air India SATS Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Air India SATS Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Air India SATS Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Air India SATS Global Group:
Air India SATS Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS Global Group!
